channel.title: Posts on IJKZEN
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on IJKZEN

item.title: Test
item.description: MobSleuth 📲 Scripts to set up your own mobile 📱 app hacking lab (currently focusing on Android) Includes the following tools: Tool Name Type Description MobSF FOSS Mobile Security Framework is an open-source, automated mobile app security testing tool. reDroid FOSS Remote anDroid solution for emulating an Android device in a container. Scrcpy FOSS A free and open-source tool that allows you to mirror and control your Android device from your computer via ADB.
